name: Millies Whole Wheat Challah
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the canola oil and honey until well combined.
3. Add the Egg Beaters=AE 99% egg substitute and stir until incorporated.
4. Pour in the water and mix until smooth.
5. Sift in the bread flour, whole wheat pastry flour, salt, sugar, and yeast into the bowl. Stir with a wooden spoon or spatula until all ingredients are combined and form a shaggy dough.
6. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for about 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
7. Shape the dough by gently stretching it with your hands, then loosely braid it into two long braids on a greased baking sheet or in a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
8. Cover the shaped dough with plastic wrap and let it rise in a warm place for about an hour until doubled in size.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Brush the risen braid with beaten egg mixed with water, then bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown on top.
11. Turn off the heat and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
